claim_statement: Dark-sector observables can be modeled with chi, tau, and Sigma variables.
method: Check algebraic consistency, unit consistency and limit behavior against linked derivation.
pass_condition: Equation is internally consistent, dimensionally valid and compatible with stated limit cases.
fail_condition: Any dimensional contradiction, algebraic inconsistency or failed limit-case reproduction.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_p3_symbolic_validation.py --test-id QNG-T-040 --claim-id QNG-C-085 --mode formal_math --dataset-id DS-007 --derivation "03_math/derivations/qng-c-085.md" --formula-anchor "Sigma = K*chi" --seed 3040 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-040"
